name: backlog-translator-extension
description: Chrome extension to translate backlog comments to Vietnamese using Claude AI
author: Development Team

scripts.dev: echo 'Load extension in chrome://extensions with Developer mode enabled'
scripts.test: echo 'Test manually in Chrome if needed'
scripts.validate: echo 'Validate manifest.json...' && node -e "const m = require('./manifest.json'); console.log('✅ Manifest valid:', m.name)"
